properties.name: Levels of Scale
properties.assessment: Multi-layer architecture: reservoir → cognitive → gameplay → world

properties.name: Strong Centres
properties.assessment: 8 living centers with clear responsibilities and interfaces

properties.name: Boundaries
properties.assessment: Module boundaries via Python packages, clear API contracts

properties.name: Alternating Repetition
properties.assessment: Echobeats 4-phase cycle, game tick loop, KSM 12-step cycle

properties.name: Positive Space
properties.assessment: Each module has active purpose, no placeholder-only code

properties.name: Good Shape
properties.assessment: Clean class hierarchies, dataclass patterns, typed interfaces

properties.name: Local Symmetries
properties.assessment: Each module follows its own patterns appropriate to its domain

properties.name: Contrast
properties.assessment: Distinct roles: MLGamer(tactics) vs GTAngel(navigation) vs Echo(cognition)

properties.name: Gradients
properties.assessment: Autonomy levels 2→6, hormone decay curves, learning rate schedules

properties.name: Roughness
properties.assessment: Chaotic micro-expressions, stochastic exploration, emergent modes

properties.name: Echoes
properties.assessment: Reservoir echo states, memory echo retrieval, Echobeats cycle echoing

properties.name: The Void
properties.assessment: Reserved hormone channels, extension points, scaffold-level modules

properties.name: Simplicity and Inner Calm
properties.assessment: Each module has single responsibility, clean interfaces

properties.name: Not-Separateness
properties.assessment: Unified GTAngelEcho integration hub, shared endocrine bus

weakest.name: The Void
weakest.assessment: Reserved hormone channels, extension points, scaffold-level modules

strongest.name: Strong Centres
strongest.assessment: 8 living centers with clear responsibilities and interfaces
